creator: mrspock@Michelle.esfm.ipn.mx
text:
"Rosegarden 2.0.1" depends on "playmidi-3.2".
"playmidi" is not in the CDs

Fix: 

There is a "playmidi" tarball in FreeBSD 2.2.5.
The only thing you have to do is compile it and install it 
before installing "Rosegarden".
How-To-Repeat: 
try to install "Rosegarden 2.0.1"
